Package de.btu.kt.syx.tutorials

package de.btu.kt.syx.tutorials

Tutorials

I assume that you are familiar with MIDI system exclusive messages. If not, you find a comprehensive introduction here.

Getting Started

  1. Creating a MIDI Interface
  2. Sending a System Exclusive Message
  3. Receiving a System Exclusive Message
  4. Adding Parameter Information

Handling Bulk Data

  1. Fetching a Patch Name
  2. Creating a Simple Patch Bank
  3. Reading and Writing SysEx Files

Advanced Coding Examples

  1. Ungültige Referenz 
    A Patch Model for Casio VZ-1/10M
  2. Ungültige Referenz 
    A Multi Model for Yamaha SY55/TG55
  3. Ungültige Referenz 
    A Test App for VZ-1/10M Patches
  4. Ungültige Referenz 
    A Test App for VZ-1/10M Patch Banks
Autor:
Matthias Wolff
